title: Fishing Rod 3D Reimagined
description: A Vanilla-styled fishing rod recreated in stunning 3D
body:
![FishingRod3D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74c5f4b9930d3d738a705d0b66b7b3b603a2d72f.png) [![Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78a16b57447c084e72ae7f6e84ae305099ba47a8.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/Mweed) [![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bbd9f919c8d606b8d25cebaf2a5075f0f9e6214.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mweed/projects) [![YouTube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/403bdcf48d3b09bab118ade3b0d0d96b4b713b51.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@mweed.minecraft) [![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/533a5e8ac07e3ad16f9f6bad3689b6ddfd749143.png)](https://discord.gg/kf7YVPyJEj) # This resource pack transforms the classic flat fishing rods into an elegant and realistic 3D model. We've kept all the charm of the original Minecraft style, but added more depth and detail for the most unique look! I plan to keep updating this project. Follow to see the latest changes. Some fishing rods might be completely redesigned later on. Can't find the mod you need? Send your suggestion to [Discord](https://discord.gg/kf7YVPyJEj) or in the [comments](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fishing-rod-3d-reimagined/comments)! ## ⚙️ Requirements ⚙️ Versions 1.20.1 and 1.21 & 1.21.1 Requires [Pommel - Held Item Models](https://modrinth.com/mod/pommel-held-item-models) Versions 1.21.4+ No mods required You are allowed to use this resource pack in modpacks and YouTube videos, as long as proper credit is given (link to the original project and my name). Any other redistribution, reuploads, edits, or commercial use is not allowed without my permission. ![Fishing Rod Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b645814ae6b075cb0ebf2d09e0fb0d610a7e3146.png)
Vanilla's Fishing Rods ![Fishing Rod](https://i.imgur.com/3yrC6m8.gif) ![Carrot On a Stick](https://i.imgur.com/vZMQcf6.gif) ![Warped Fungus On a Stick](https://i.imgur.com/TtJMXh5.gif)
